vulkan_vendor_baseline.driver_name: Qualcomm Technologies Inc. Adreno Vulkan Driver

notes: 40591 is the latest working Wi-Fi ADB transport used in this release-prep session.
KGSL frequency and busy sysfs nodes remain permission-gated without elevated device privileges.
Vendor Vulkan baseline is evidence-only; TurboQuant production route is the custom repo-local stack.
